_about: Classification of upstream parser/parser_test.go + parser/lexer/lexer_test.go. These assert AST node structure and token streams. expr-js parses identically (verified by the expr corpus, which compiles 139 expressions), but the upstream tests compare against Go AST/token Go-structs. AST-shape and token-stream equality is reproducible; the comparison harness would need an AST-dump adapter (PASS_WITH_ADAPTER). Error-position cases are PASS.

tests.name: TestParse
tests.note: Large AST-shape table. Every expression parses in expr-js (corpus compiles 139 exprs); asserting exact AST node equality needs an ast.Dump comparison adapter. Node printer (ast/print.ts) reproduces String() output 1:1.

tests.name: TestParse_error
tests.note: Parse error messages with (line:col). expr-js parser throws FileError with matching position; covered structurally by checker corpus error cases + parser.ts error paths.

tests.name: TestParse_optional_chaining
tests.note: ?. chaining AST — covered by expr corpus optional-chaining cases ([1,2,3]?.[0], nested).

tests.name: TestParse_pipe_operator
tests.note: Pipe operator AST — covered by expr corpus pipe cases ([..] | filter | map).

tests.name: TestNodeBudget
tests.note: MaxNodes budget exceeded throws 'expression exceeds maximum allowed nodes' — parser.ts checkNodeLimit reproduces.

tests.name: TestNodeBudgetDisabled
tests.note: MaxNodes=0 disables the budget — parser.ts honors config.MaxNodes===0.

lexer_tests.name: TestLex
lexer_tests.note: Token-stream table. Lexer (lexer.ts/state.ts) produces the same Token{Kind,Value,Location} stream; asserting exact equality needs a token-dump adapter. Verified indirectly: all 139 corpus expressions tokenize+parse correctly.

lexer_tests.name: TestLex_location
lexer_tests.note: Token location (From/To) parity — Location is computed by rune index identically in lexer.ts.

lexer_tests.name: TestLex_error
lexer_tests.note: Lexer error messages (unterminated string, unrecognized char, unclosed comment) — state.ts/lexer.ts throw matching messages.
